releases.body_excerpt:
# Release v5.9.0


## New Model additions

### Cohere2Moe

Command A+ is a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model from Cohere that features a hybrid attention pattern combining sliding window and full attention layers. The model incorporates both shared and routed experts and supports a very large context window for processing extensive text sequences.

**Links:** Documentation
* Add new cohere2_moe model (#46115) by @Cyrilvallez in #46115

### Parakeet tdt (#44171)

* Parakeet td

### Fixed

* sync: fix underflow in mpsc channel `len()` ([#8062])
* sync: notify receivers in mpsc `OwnedPermit::release()` method ([#8075])
* sync: require that an `RwLock` has `max_readers != 0` ([#8076])
* sync: return `Empty` from `try_recv()` when mpsc is closed with outstanding permits ([#8074])

# Release v5.8.0


## New Model additions

### DeepSeek-V4



DeepSeek-V4 is the next-generation MoE (Mixture of Experts) language model from DeepSeek that introduces several architectural innovations over DeepSeek-V3. The architecture replaces Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA) with a hybrid local + long-range attention design, swaps residual connections for Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), and bootstraps the first few MoE layers with a static token-id → expert-id hash tabl

releases.body_excerpt:
# Release v5.7.0


## New Model additions

### Laguna



Laguna is Poolside's mixture-of-experts language model family that extends standard SwiGLU MoE transformers with two key innovations. It features per-layer head counts allowing different decoder layers to have different query-head counts while sharing the same KV cache shape, and implements a sigmoid MoE router with auxiliary-loss-free load balancing that uses element-wise sigmoid of gate logits plus learned per-expert bias for ro

releases.body_excerpt:
# Release v5.6.0


## New Model additions

### OpenAI Privacy Filter

OpenAI Privacy Filter is a bidirectional token-classification model for personally identifiable information (PII) detection and masking in text. It is intended for high-throughput data sanitization workflows where teams need a model that they can run on-premises that is fast, context-aware, and tunable. The model labels an input sequence in a single forward pass, then decodes coherent spans with a constrained Viterbi pr

# 1.52.1 (April 16th, 2026)

## Fixed

- runtime: revert [#7757] to fix [a regression][#8056] that causes `spawn_blocking` to hang ([#8057])

[#7757]: https://github.com/tokio-rs/tokio/pull/7757
[#8056]: https://github.com/tokio-rs/tokio/pull/8056
[#8057]: https://github.com/tokio-rs/tokio/pull/8057

releases.name: tiangolo/fastapi
releases.body_excerpt:
### Refactors

* 🔥 Remove April Fool's `@app.vibe()` 🤪. PR #15363 by @tiangolo.

### Internal

* ⬆ Bump cryptography from 46.0.5 to 46.0.7. PR #15314 by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot).
* ⬆ Bump strawberry-graphql from 0.307.1 to 0.312.3. PR #15309 by [@dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot).
* 🔨 Add pre-commit hook to ensure latest release header has date. PR #15293 by @YuriiMotov.

releases.name: astral-sh/uv
releases.body_excerpt:
## Release Notes

Released on 2026-04-15.

### Python

- Upgrade CPython build to 20260414 including an OpenSSL security upgrade (#19004)

### Enhancements

- Elevate configuration errors to `required-version` mismatches (#18977)
- Further improve TLS certificate validation messages (#18933)
- Improve `--exclude-newer` hints  (#18952)

### Preview features

- Fix `--script` handling in `uv audit` (#18970)
- Fix traversal of extras in `uv audit` (#18970)

### Bug fixes

- De-quote `workspace meta

changes: Building applications with LLMs through composability
An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.
remove PySequence downcast (#6803)
optimize `arg_min/arg_max` (#6799)
boolean `Series` broadcast comparison (eq/neq) against scalar True/False (#6797)
ensure join frame types are consistent (#6798)
enable empty DataFrame (and Series) init from List of Structs/Lists schema/dtype (#6795)
Build and publish crates with pyo3, cffi and uniffi bindings as well as rust binaries as python packages
The official Python library for the openai API
`#[tokio::main]` when `rt-core` feature flag is not enabled (#2139)
remove `AsyncBufRead` from `BufStre
Embeddings, Retrieval, and Reranking
Data validation using Python type hints
Avoid failing when deserializing unknown tags (#10655)
Blazingly fast DataFrame library
The official Python library for the openai API

An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.

feat(python): add  parameter to DeltaTable.to_pyarrow_dataset() by @adriangb in https://github.com/delta-io/delta-rs/pull/2465
feat(python, rust): respect column stats collection configurations by @ion-elgreco in https://github.com/delta-io/delta-rs/pull/2428
fix(rust): implement abort commit for S3DynamoDBLogStore by @PeterKeDer in https://github.com/delta-io/delta-rs/pull/2452
fix(python, rust): use new schema for stats parsing instead of old by @ion
Parse and store extras on editable requirements (#3629)
Allow local versions in wheel filenames (#3596)
Create lib64 symlink for 64-bit, non-macOS, POSIX environments (#3584)
Add `UV_CONCURRENT_INSTALLS` variable in favor of `RAYON_NUM_THREADS` (#3646)
Add serialization and deserialization for `--find-links` (#3619)
Apply combination logic to merge CLI and persistent configuration (#3618)
**added:** Document sharing state between handler and middleware ([#783])
**added:** `Extension` can now be used in tuples for building responses, and will set an
**added:** `extract::Host` for extracting the hostname of a request ([#827])
**added:** Add `IntoResponseParts` trait which allows defining custom response
**added:** `TypedHeader` implements the new `IntoResponseParts` t
ESM openfold_utils type hints  by @ringohoffman in #20544
Add cPython files in build by @sgugger in #21372

Fix inclusion of non py files in package by @sgugger in #21546

discoveries.description: Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development.
Apache Superset is a Data Visualization and Data Exploration Platform
Python ETL framework for stream processing, real-time analytics, LLM pipelines, and RAG.

AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
Free universal database tool and SQL client

Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]
ClickHouse® is a real-time analytics database management system
Apache Airflow - A platform to programmatically author, schedule, and monitor workflows
Qdrant - High-performance, massive-scale Vector Database and Vector Search Engine for the next generation of AI. Also available in the cloud https://cloud.qdrant.io/
Build, deploy, and orchestrate AI agents. Sim is the central intelligence layer for your AI workforce.
From the team behind Gatsby, Mastra is a framework for building AI-powered applications and agents with a modern TypeScript stack.
A high-performance observability data pipeline.

Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. Red teaming/pentesting/vulnerability scanning for AI. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration.  Used by OpenAI and Anthropic.
End-to-end, code-first tutorials for building production-grade GenAI agents. From prototype to enterprise deployment.
📊 Cube Core is open-source semantic layer for AI, BI and embedded analytics
YC (S26) | Give AI the ability to live your experience. Records everything you do, say, hear 24/7, local, private, secure
Open source agentic operating system
Memory control plane for AI Agents in 6 lines of code
The official home of the Presto distributed SQL query engine for big data

Weaviate is an open-source vector database that stores both objects and vectors, allowing for the combination of vector search with structured filtering with the fault tolerance and scalability of a cloud-native database​.
Apache Doris is an easy-to-use, high performance and unified analytics database.
Official repository of Trino, the distributed SQL query engine for big data, formerly known as PrestoSQL (https://trino.io)
Redpanda is a streaming data platform for developers. Kafka API compatible. 10x faster. No ZooKeeper. No JVM!
Run, manage, and scale AI workloads on any AI infrastructure. Use one system to access & manage all AI compute (Kubernetes, Slurm, 20+ clouds, on-prem).
cuDF - GPU DataFrame Library
🐚 Python-powered shell. Full-featured, cross-platform and AI-friendly.
Data Agent Ready Warehouse : One for  Analytics, Search, AI, Python Sandbox.  — rebuilt from scratch. Unified architecture on your S3.
Python SQL Parser and Transpiler
Event streaming platform for agentic AI. Continuously ingest, transform, and serve event streams in real time, at scale.
Apache DataFusion SQL Query Engine

A polyglot document intelligence framework with a Rust core. Extract text, metadata, images, and structured information from PDFs, Office documents, images, and 97+ formats. Available for Rust, Python, Ruby, Java, Go, PHP, Elixir, C#, R, C, TypeScript (Node/Bun/Wasm/Deno)- or use via CLI, REST API, or MCP server.
Fast and Lightweight Logs, Metrics and Traces processor for Linux, BSD, OSX and Windows
Open Source Feature Flags, Experimentation, and Product Analytics
The Open Source Feature Store for AI/ML
The AI search platform

Open Lakehouse Format for Multimodal AI. Convert from Parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, and PyTorch with more integrations coming..
Statistical Machine Intelligence & Learning Engine
The live data layer for apps and AI agents. Create up-to-the-second views into your business, just using SQL
Your super agent for work: local-first, learn your working context in mins and never forget it.
Simple and Distributed Machine Learning
Distributed stream processing engine in Rust
Emdash is the Open-Source Agentic Development Environment (🧡 YC W26). Run multiple coding agents in parallel. Use any provider.
Blazing-fast Data-Wrangling toolkit
a curated list of awesome streaming frameworks, applications, etc
C++ DataFrame for statistical, financial, and ML analysis in modern C++
Drop-in Apache Spark replacement written in Rust, unifying batch processing, stream processing, and compute-intensive AI workloads.
🤖 Type-safe, provider-agnostic TypeScript AI SDK for streaming chat, tool calling, agents, and multimodal apps across OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, React, Vue, Svelte, and Solid.
A MySQL-compatible relational database with a storage agnostic query engine. Implemented in Go.
Meltano: the declarative code-first data integration engine that powers your wildest data and ML-powered product ideas. Say goodbye to writing, maintaining, and scaling your own API integrations.
ArcticDB is a high performance, serverless DataFrame database built for the Python Data Science ecosystem.
YTsaurus is a scalable and fault-tolerant open-source big data platform.
Community maintained hardware plugin for vLLM on Ascend
Apache DataFusion Ballista Distributed Query Engine
Apache Polaris, the interoperable, open source catalog for Apache Iceberg
Machine learning with dataframes
:metal: TT-NN operator library, and TT-Metalium low level kernel programming model.
Free LLM API keys for GPT-5.5, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok — copy, paste, use. Updated 3-5x daily. No credit card needed.
ClickBench: a Benchmark For Analytical Databases
Graph database implementing the RDF and SPARQL standards. Very fast and scales to more than a trillion triples on a single commodity machine
An experimental embedded SQL engine in C++20. Query Parquet, CSV, JSON, Arrow, Avro, SQLite, and Excel files directly with SQL, in-process. Early-stage.
Open-source agentic data engineering harness for dbt, SQL, and cloud warehouses. 100+ tools, 10 warehouses, AI-powered.
Databricks Terraform Provider
ktx is an executable context layer for data and analytics agents 🐙 Allow Claude Code, Codex, and any AI agent to query data accurately through MCP with skills, memory and a semantic layer
📬 A knowledge graph querying framework for JavaScript
Databricks SDK for Python (Beta)
Executable memory system for tabular data work
